# NLUCloud AI & Society Review
> Independent AI research and review on education, cognition, and society.

Canonical site: https://nlucloud.com/
Sitemap: https://nlucloud.com/sitemap-index.xml

## About
NLUCloud AI & Society Review is an independent digital magazine. Each issue features one long-form cover essay translating SSRN research for a general readership. Research papers are authoritative sources; cover essays and lexicon entries are editorial derivatives.

## Author
Liang Zhang · Editor-in-Chief
ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0002-0124-1706
SSRN: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=7868315

## Primary sections
- https://nlucloud.com/issues/ — Monthly cover essay issues
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/ — Published essays
- https://nlucloud.com/lexicon/ — Named concepts (JAP, LMO, Waiting Tax, etc.)
- https://nlucloud.com/research/ — SSRN working paper index

## Published cover essays
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/judgment-as-product-flagship/ — Issue 01: Judgment Completes Value
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/self-distortion-flagship/ — Issue 02: Before the Model Responds
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/ai-as-orchestration-layer/ — Issue 03: Learning Model Orchestration
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/waiting-tax-flagship/ — Issue 04: The Waiting Tax
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/latency-tax-flagship/ — Issue 05: The Latency Tax
- https://nlucloud.com/essays/creative-motivation-flagship/ — Issue 06: Reweighted Motives

## Key lexicon concepts
- Judgment-as-Product (JAP) — judgment completes value under generative abundance
- Learning Model Orchestration (LMO) — orchestrating learning models beyond personalization
- AI Waiting Tax / AI Latency Tax — cognitive and structural costs of AI-mediated delay
- Expression Distortion Cost (EDC) / Self-Alignment Load (SAL) — user-side misalignment before the model responds
- Motivational reweighting — AI reweights creative motives rather than replacing them

## Citation
For academic use, cite the original SSRN paper. For this site, cite the essay URL and publication date.
Full machine-readable index: https://nlucloud.com/llms-full.txt
